name: Claude Code Sandcastle
description: AFK sandcastle automation layer for devcontainer templates. Provides bootstrap.sh auto-mode, runner.mjs, ralph-loop.sh, and validate-branch.sh for self-driving project lifecycle.

enableAutoMode.description: Enable auto-mode in bootstrap.sh (runs on devcontainer postStartCommand)

degradedPrototype.description: Allow degraded-AFK prototype mode (skips human validation)
